steps.title: Find the definition clue
steps.content: The colon after the blank signals that what follows defines it. The clause reads: "a constantly evolving network of channels and strips of land that change in size and shape." The key phrase is constantly evolving — the blank must mean something like "always changing."

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the answer
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'dynamic': Means constantly changing or active — directly matches "constantly evolving." ✓
  • Choice B — 'sustainable': Means able to be maintained long-term; says nothing about change. ✗
  • Choice C — 'immutable': Means unchanging — the opposite of what the clue describes. ✗
  • Choice D — 'unrivaled': Means without equal; unrelated to evolving or changing. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
